short_reason: Well-structured, accurate, and substantive article on AI-driven API rate limiting, but the target keyword 'security tool' is entirely absent from the title and body. The title also reads too academic for a blog format, and the H1/H2 could be sharpened for click-through appeal.
red_flags: Target keyword 'security tool' does not appear anywhere in the article
Title is overly long and academic; lacks natural engagement
Introduction opens too technically for a general blog audience
Article covers a narrow niche (API rate limiting) but does not connect it to the broader 'security tool' category for SEO purposes
